parsed.availability_comment: Auctioned to KKR for IPL 2026 and no later adverse report found after the October 2025 bowling soreness update.
parsed.availability_note: No fresh injury or unavailability report found before KKR's published first four IPL 2026 fixtures; current estimate covers only that published phase.
parsed.followup_reason: Need toss-day confirmation on whether Green plays as a batting-heavy overseas pick or full all-rounder, and how KKR balance Narine/Pathirana/Allen/Rachin/Seifert/Powell around him.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Green looks higher-priority than most overseas backups, but Narine and Pathirana-type picks can squeeze combinations.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Strong candidate for one of four overseas slots, but KKR have multiple overseas top-order, spin and pace options.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Record overseas buy and Russell-replacement profile point to regular XI use, though final overseas mix is still matchup-dependent.

content.text:
You are doing a focused IPL 2026 player availability and lineup audit.

You are refining one player's non-stats fields after an initial team-level pass.
Use web search. Prefer official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources, then reputable cricket reporting.

Rules:
- Return JSON only.
- Keep the same schema as the team-level player object.
- Resolve ambiguity where possible using recent evidence.
- Keep comments short and audit-friendly.
- If evidence remains conflicting, say so explicitly and keep needs_player_followup=true.
- Every source URL array must contain at least one URL.

Refine this single-player non-stats assessment and return the structured JSON.
